config.grafana.api_key_empty: Please enter an API key first.
config.grafana.api_key_save_failed: Failed to save API key to vault.
help.grafana.api_key: Grafana service account token or API key. Stored securely in the encrypted vault.
help.grafana.base_url: Base URL of your Grafana instance, for example http://grafana.local:3000.
help.grafana.enabled: Enables the read-only Grafana integration. The agent can inspect dashboards, data sources, alerts, health, and organization information.
help.grafana.insecure_ssl: Skip TLS certificate verification for self-signed certificates. Only use this inside trusted local networks.
help.grafana.readonly: Keep Grafana access read-only. Version 1 only performs read operations.
help.grafana.request_timeout: Timeout in seconds for Grafana API requests. Default: 15.
